+ back to UGC Video Creator Workflow
UGC Video Creator Workflow

Step 07 — Image Gen in Higgsfield

Take your Nano Banana Pro prompts from GPT into Higgsfield and generate images of your consistent model. Upload the prompt plus your reference images when generating.

Tips: Unlimited mode lets you generate without spending a credit, but takes longer — skip it if you're in a hurry. 4K gives the best quality and closest adherence to your prompt, but also takes longer.

Higgsfield uses the shared team Glamrs login.

← Previous step Next step →
